message:
Stabilize ExecutionWave serde tags, enrich test harness coverage, fix diagnostics CLI field access

ExecutionWave serde: replace #[serde(rename_all = "snake_case")] with
explicit per-variant #[serde(rename = "wave_0")] etc. The rename_all
attribute produced "wave0" (no underscore) which broke JSON contract
compatibility. Both integration test files and the source module now
assert the exact serialized tags are "wave_0" through "wave_3".

Test harness enrichment (+685 lines): comprehensive coverage for
HarnessLane (as_str, Display, serde round-trip for all 5 variants),
BaselineScenarioDomain (as_str, Display, serde round-trip for all 3
variants), and additional edge-case coverage for artifact bundle
validation, coordination event schema stability, and wave handoff
package structure.

Runtime diagnostics CLI: fix preflight mandatory field validation to
access support_bundle.files directly instead of the removed
support_bundle.index.files path. Matching integration test updated.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
